About: It is about the Alter Hof, a stone quad in front of a large manor.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Adolf Hitler.
HeldIn: It was held in the basement of the U.S. Army Center of Military History in Washington, D.C.
UsedFor: It is used for depicting the Alter Hof, a stone quad in front of a large manor.
